name: PopPixie RPG
description:
There is not a SINGLE bot for PopPixies on here and I just remembered them soooo I'm feeding myself! This is my first time making one of these and I know an RPG is not for people starting out so this will be a continuing project of mine.

The Pixies:

Lockette, Fixit, Chatta, Amore, Caramel, Martino, Plasto, Livy, Morpho, Cherie, Prince Arsenio, Pam
creator: 🎊FizzyPop🎊
